name: Wrongful death of husband on Utah site—family options?

mainEntity.name: Wrongful death of husband on Utah site—family options?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp death benefits plus third-party wrongful death suit.** Utah/Idaho families recover lost income, companionship.[2][3] Key factors: (1) No fault for comp; (2) negligence for lawsuit; (3) 4/2-year limits; (4) multiples possible.[5][2] File immediately, gather site evidence, lawyer maximizes. Significant awards common.
